news.summary: Key PointsCEO Vineet Nargolwala acquired 13,011 shares for a total transaction value of approximately ~$1.0 million, based on a weighted average price of $76.86 per share on June 10, 2026.

news.summary: Key PointsAnthropic says its new Claude Fable family of models is as powerful as the Mythos model that it chose not to release to the public.

news.title: Sparkle over gold: Men’s diamond jewellery shines despite soaring gold prices
news.summary: The men’s jewellery market registered 30% growth last year and the market has tripled since 2020; Once restricted to weddings, men already account for 15% of the total jewellery market valued at ₹8.70 lakh crore

news.title: Wall Street is gaining access to new catastrophe models to help predict wars
news.summary: Wars are upending the finance industry’s ability to predict everything from the price of oil to the cost of a mortgage

news.title: Inflation data, US Fed interest rate decision, crude oil major drivers for stock markets: Analysts
news.summary: Besides, the status of the US-Iran deal signing on Sunday, trading activity of foreign investors and movement in global markets would also drive sentiments in domestic equities, say experts
